description: Kakao Corp. is a South Korean technology company that operates messaging, payments, mobility, content, and other digital services. The kakaocorp.com domain is the corporate site for company information, news, and partner inquiries.
summary: kakaocorp.com itself exposes no documented developer integration surfaces; its corporate site only points to separate developer properties on other domains such as developers.kakao.com and developers.kakaopay.com.
